title: vaccinium minus
intro: Vaccinium minus, also known as small cranberry or lowbush cranberry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating urinary tract infections and inflammation, due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. In terms of health benefits, Vaccinium minus has been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help prevent conditions such as kidney stones and certain types of cancer. Vaccinium minus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to support urinary tract health and overall well-being.
